---
name: Bug Report
about: Create a report to help us improve dotUniverse
title: '[BUG] '
labels: 'bug'
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the Bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## To Reproduce

Steps to reproduce the behavior:

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior

A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened instead.

## Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.

## Terminal Output

If the bug is related to the terminal, paste the relevant output here:

```
[paste terminal output here]
```

## Environment

**Desktop:**
- Browser: [e.g., Chrome 120, Firefox 121, Safari 17]
- OS: [e.g., Windows 11, macOS 14, Ubuntu 22.04]
- Screen Resolution: [e.g., 1920x1080, 2560x1440]

**Mobile:**
- Device: [e.g., iPhone 15, Samsung Galaxy S24]
- Browser: [e.g., Chrome Mobile, Safari iOS]
- OS: [e.g., iOS 17, Android 14]
- Screen Size: [e.g., 6.1", 6.7"]

## Browser Console Errors

If applicable, open the browser console (F12) and paste any relevant errors:

```
[paste console errors here]
```

## Steps Already Tried

What have you already tried to fix the issue?

- [ ] Refreshed the page
- [ ] Cleared browser cache
- [ ] Tried a different browser
- [ ] Tried incognito/private mode
- [ ] Disabled browser extensions

## Additional Context

Add any other context about the problem here.

## Severity

How severe is this bug?

- [ ] Critical — Site is broken/unusable
- [ ] Major — Important feature not working
- [ ] Minor — Cosmetic issue or minor inconvenience
- [ ] Trivial — Very minor issue

## Checklist

- [ ] I have searched for existing issues that describe this bug
- [ ] I have provided steps to reproduce the issue
- [ ] I have included my environment information
- [ ] I have included screenshots/console errors if applicable
